}%00000000_00000000_00000000_00000000,{   'index=$0
}%11111111_01001000_00100000_00011000,{   'index=$1

}%11111111_10111000_01110000_01100000     'index=$d
     'Total number of colors = $e = 14 (decimal)

}%00000000_00000000_00000000_00000000,{   'index=$0
}%11111111_01001000_00100000_00011000,{   'index=$1

}%11111111_10111000_01110000_01100000,{   'index=$4

}%11111111_11111000_11001000_10001000,{   'index=$8

     'Total number of colors = $a = 10 (decimal)

     'Total number of colors = $11 = 17 (decimal)

}%00000000_00000000_00000000_00000000,{   'index=$0

}%11111111_11001000_00111000_00100000     'index=$7
     'Total number of colors = $8 = 8 (decimal)

Azula_29Colors long {
}%00000000_00000000_00000000_00000000,{   'index=$0
}%11111111_01001000_00100000_00011000,{   'index=$1
}%11111111_10111000_01110000_01100000,{   'index=$2
}%11111111_01101000_00011000_00010000,{   'index=$3
}%11111111_10001000_00101000_00011000,{   'index=$4
}%11111111_10100000_00100000_00011000,{   'index=$5
}%11111111_10011000_01010000_01001000,{   'index=$6
}%11111111_11001000_00111000_00100000,{   'index=$7
}%11111111_11111000_11001000_10001000,{   'index=$8
}%11111111_11100000_10100000_01011000     'index=$9
     'Total number of colors = $a = 10 (decimal)
